Package dk.mada.jaxrs.generator.mpclient.api.tmpl

Interface CtxApi

@JStache(path="api") @Immutable public interface CtxApi
Context passed to Mustache when compiling an api.

    static final record 
    CtxApi.CtxOperationExternalDoc

    CtxApi.CtxOperationRef
    A reference to an operation.
